headline: A Look At Leidos Holdings (LDOS) Valuation After New State Department Evolve Contract Awards
summary: Leidos Holdings (LDOS) just secured a set of awards under the US Department of State’s multi year Evolve contract, tying the stock more closely to a high profile federal IT modernization effort. See our latest analysis for Leidos Holdings. Against this contract win, Leidos’s share price is up 1.95% over the last day and 5.01% over the past week, yet down 9.44% over 30 days and 25.72% over 90 days. The 3 year total shareholder return of 73.27% contrasts with a weaker 1 year total shareholder...
